meaning: adj.逍遥自在的,悠闲的,懒散的,(马)行动时平稳自在的,(品德)放荡的,不严肃的
examples: He was an easygoing man of very moderate views.
Most meeting times can be changed, even if an exact time is given, Ghanaians are very relaxed and easygoing.
Those qualities that make interaction with other people enjoyable would be imitated as closely as possible, and the machine would appear to be charming, and easygoing.
Tiger families and easygoing families ranked second, with about the same number in each category.
And the easygoing pace helps compensate for a lodging experience that can't truly be called luxe.
